entities.name: ASCOCHYTA BLIGHT
entities.description: A fungal disease affecting chickpea plants caused by the pathogen Ascochyta rabiei

entities.name: ASCOCHYTA RABIEI
entities.description: The fungal pathogen responsible for causing ascochyta blight

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume crop Cicer arietinum L. studied for resistance to ascochyta blight

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the chickpea plant to withstand ascochyta blight, characterized as quantitative with a vertical component

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE INHERITANCE
entities.description: A mode of inheritance where a trait is controlled by multiple genes

entities.name: VERTICAL RESISTANCE
entities.description: A component of resistance that is typically gene-for-gene and isolate-specific

entities.name: DISEASE RATING
entities.description: The process of collecting data to assess the severity of disease in different environments

entities.name: GENE PYRAMIDING
entities.description: A breeding strategy used to combine multiple resistance genes into a single variety to combat disease

entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: Genetic resources used in breeding programs to introduce diverse resistance genes
